chromecast for casting or mirroring
*Note:* dont get confused with term "stream" and map to streaming device. This is NOT a streaming device. This "enables" casting from your mobile /laptops to TV etc.

Used to cast video content to your TV from your mobile, tablet, or computer. Acts as a bridge between your mobile device or computer and your television, enabling you to stream content from online sources to your TV screen Please note, this product doesn't support streaming directly on the device to which it is connected (TV). Not similar to Fire tv stick. Fire Stick is a standalone streaming device that plugs into your TV's HDMI port. It comes with a remote control and has its own user interface, allowing you to browse and access various streaming apps directly on the device.

chromecast with Google TV
*Note :* enables streaming apps and services directly on the device-along with casting functionality.

The Chromecast with Google TV has its own user interface and operating system, which allows you to access various streaming apps and services directly on the device. You can browse through content, search for movies and TV shows, and select what you want to watch using the included remote control or voice commands. Similar to Fire TV stick.
miracast for screen mirroring and casting

NOTE :  two-way-radio-headsets [ B0CJFDJF3L (https://selection.amazon.com/item/1/B0CJFDJF3L/)] - primarily designed for communication over radio channel. Usually includes a microphone for transmitting voice messages, an earpiece, or headphone for receiving audio, and sometimes a push-to-talk button for activating transmission. Used in professional setup like construction, security, manufacturing etc.
2) safety-earmuffs : . These can be electronic or non-electronic. These are used primarily for ear protection. Do not get confused with keywords like "Radio headphones, radio headset, radio FM, headphones" from the title/description. Radio FM is only a feature allowing the audio playback feature during work. This is different from "two-way-radio-headsets" in electronics_av_radios and standard headsets in headphones_incl_accessories.

Designed specifically for communication over two-way radio systems. Has push to talk button. Enable users to transmit and receive messages over two-way radio frequencies, allowing for coordination in professional environments.
These are different from standard headsets [B0B2DK63BQ (https://selection.amazon.com/item/1/B0B2DK63BQ/)] used for activities such as listening to music, making phone calls, gaming, or participating in virtual meetings Terminology 'radio headset' in this case refers to headsets that provide audio playback from radio stations. These do not enable communication through Radio channel. The headsets that enable communication to and fro over a two way radio systems are called as "two way radio headsets" under electronics_av_radios.
